label: add 3 orbiting motes inside glass orb
notes: 3 white pinprick spheres on 3 perpendicular orbits, rendered through orthographic camera, blurred and additively boosted for bloom halo, fed into glsl_orb input[2]. Shader samples motes texture at refracted UVs (with CA) and adds to refractRGB so the glass naturally bends and rim-fringes the lights. Placeholder motion: deterministic 0.30/0.40/0.50 Hz orbits, R=0.5 in unit-volume world space. Audio reactivity deferred. Mid-build: corrected geometryCOMP par from instanceop (SOP-only) to instancetop per Act 2 vortex reference. Removed TD's auto-created default torus1 inside geo_motes that was rendering as a giant white blob. Rollback: destroy base_motes (cascades children), disconnect glsl_orb input[2], restore glsl_orb_pixel text.

operations.before: TD-auto-created default torusPOP — recreate by re-instantiating geometryCOMP if rolling back
